titles.title: Liang Zhi Laoshu de Shenghuo Yijian

data.title: Liang Zhi Laoshu de Shenghuo Yijian
Hong Shizi Jie Di
data.synopsis:
This story series tells the tale of two adorable twins, Tian'an and Tian'you, who possess extraordinary abilities and bravely fight against Garp and his loyal henchmen to protect Happy Town. Tian'an was born one minute and thirty seconds before Tian'you. Although they possess superhuman abilities, they still can't escape the usual chores of a seven-year-old, such as doing homework, making their beds, and cleaning their rooms… The siblings' superpowers came purely by chance. When they were infants, in their mother's laboratory, their mother, Professor Tomato, was busy conducting experiments and didn't notice that their father, Mr. Tomato, had fed them some experimental liquid. Suddenly, with a "whoosh," a huge explosion occurred, and when the smoke cleared, two children were still happily giggling, as if nothing had happened. From then on, the siblings possessed extraordinary abilities. Tian'an can fly around the house, and Tian'you can easily lift heavy objects as if they were feathers.

(Source: iQIYI, translated)
